scope: Audit-only backend performance opportunity mapping for Real Backend Test public hot paths.

currentHotPathState.blogListFirstPageNoSearch: 1 PostgreSQL command via window query, pageSize=12 retained

validations.result: passed: Backend architecture, component, integration, unit, Browser smoke, Compose Dev Verification, Frontend lint/types/unit, Pact provider

validations.command: dotnet test backend/tests/WoongBlog.Api.IntegrationTests/WoongBlog.Api.IntegrationTests.csproj --filter focused public hot path contracts --no-restore --logger console;verbosity=minimal
hot-path rg scan for AsNoTracking, EF.CompileAsyncQuery, SqlQuery, CountAsync, JsonSerializer, JsonDocument.Parse, Include, blocking waits
validations.result: completed; no Include or blocking wait patterns on selected public hot-path files

recommendation: Keep real targets and pageSize=12. Use target-level metrics to choose the next slice: compression/body strategy if payload/receive dominates; serialization fast-path if app elapsed/GC dominates; DB/pool inspection only if DB open/command latency rises again.
